Product page

Upscaler Studio

Position Upscaler Studio as a premium local AI upscaling desktop tool for Windows, focused on image and video workflows, batch processing, compare/history visibility, and stronger runtime control.

Download trial Buy license
Queue input
Batch execution

Recommended model, status tracking, compare flow.

Review export

What to communicate

The product story should stay disciplined.

Core positioning

  • Local AI upscaling for Windows
  • Image and video workflows
  • Batch, compare, history, control
  • Premium desktop UX direction

Avoid overclaiming

  • Do not promise final compliance until release gates are closed
  • Do not promise enterprise guarantees you do not yet support
  • Keep legal and support details honest and explicit

Feature framing

What the site should highlight first

Quality workflow

Lead with output quality, repeatability, and control.

Desktop trust

Lean into local processing, inspectability, and user ownership.

Professional usability

Show that the product is guided and premium, not just technical.

EDITH Dev Studio

Publisher brand for Upscaler Studio and future premium Windows-first desktop software.
